title: Positive economic data in China boosts sentiment
section_path: Positive economic data in China boosts sentiment
section_path_text: Positive economic data in China boosts sentiment
summary:
Main
Renewed tensions in the Middle East lifted oil prices. Strong economic data in China boosted sentiment in the metal markets. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-11-01 125116.png | assets/2024-11-01_oej89m96rcx7jz4rm92idp7vvri184_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_ac41bf932169.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil rose for a second consecutive day on heightened tensions in the Middle East.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Renewed tensions in the Middle East lifted oil prices. Strong economic data in China boosted sentiment in the metal markets.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil rose for a second consecutive day on heightened tensions in the Middle East. Israeli intelligence suggested that Iran is preparing to attack Israel from Iraqi territory in the coming days, possibly before the US election, according to a report from Axios.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: The recent rally in alumina prices hasn't been replicated in the aluminium market. This is unlikely to remain the case, with either alumina prices to fall or aluminium to gain.
